^6 = MODS:
[LVLS]
00	Start menu
01	Pokitaru
02	Ryllus
03	Kalidon
04	Metalis (Clank Challenges - Buzzsaw Blitz)
05	Dream Time
06	Medical Outpoust Omega
07	Challax
08	Dayni moon
09	Inside Clank
0A	Quadrona
0B	(Un-Named)
0C	{Un-Named)
0D	(Just Flying)
0E	??
0F	Metalis (Mini Game first)
10	Island Escape (2 players)
11	Danger Valley (2 Players)
12	Mega Cannons (2players)
13	Moon Cow Disease (2 Player)
14	Configure Game (2 player)
15	Kalidon (2 Player Need to use from 2 player mode)
16	Skeyboard Challenge - ??
17	Destroued Outpoust Omega
18	Hig Treehouse
[/LVLS]
